title: engines.engine_contract_verified
description: WS-288 / FIND-122 — deterministic post-run cross-check of an engine briefing's Contract Alignment claims against measurable evidence (synthesis structure, cross-critique AS-N engagement, success_shape keyword presence). Emitted by kit/scripts/cwos-engine-contract-verify.js. Per-field verdict surfaces where a synthesizer-self-attestation departed from observable artifacts. v1 returns BLOCKED-BY-WS-289 for scope_ceiling pending the per-engine token meter.

contract_id.description: Refers back to the engine_intent_recorded event's contract_id

binding.description: How the verifier bound this run to the contract event. engine_run_completed = canonical (run_id-pinned). heuristic = engine+target+timestamp proximity (brittle if multiple runs share engine+target on one day).

alarmed.description: True iff overall=FAIL; routes a HIGH-severity finding to prog-engine-reliability
